entries.reason: Splitting persistence, refresh hooks, and recovery tests would create temporarily inconsistent public behavior and would force reviewers to reason across dependent PRs; unrelated cleanup is excluded.
entries.note: Advisory precedent only; matching this fingerprint never auto-closes future gates.
